series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 2933.53(B)(9), the Ohio Attorney General's Office receives and issues a written statement agreeing or disagreeing with the issuance of an interception warrant, such as a wiretap, by county prosecuting attorney. Records include, but are not limited to, the initial application from county prosecuting attorney as well as the written response from the OAG.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years from issuance. ; Paper: Retain 3 years from issuance. If scanned and saved electronically, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
